pi_items.source: Task description states 'Field Type: Text (plain, long)'. Per Drupal documentation (drupal.org/docs/drupal-apis/entity-api/fieldtypes-fieldwidgets-and-fieldformatters), 'Text (plain, long)' UI label maps to machine name 'string_long', not 'text_long'. Text (formatted, long) maps to 'text_long'.
Task description specifies 'Field Type: Boolean'. Drupal documentation confirms 'Boolean' UI label maps to 'boolean' machine name.
Task description specifies: 'Label: Gift Wrap Requested'

pi_items.metadata_value: not_required (implicit in metadata, explicit in task description)
pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states for both fields: 'This field should NOT be required.'

pi_items.metadata_value: implicit true (per verifier.py checks for msg_in_form and wrap_in_form)
pi_items.source: Task description states: 'Ensure both fields are enabled in the Manage form display tab so they appear on the order admin form.'

privileged_info_summary: Task 'add_gift_order_fields@1' requires adding two custom fields to Drupal Commerce order type. Field 'field_gift_wrap' (Boolean, optional, form-enabled, label 'Gift Wrap Requested') metadata is verified correct. However, the 'field_gift_message' metadata contains a critical error: metadata claims type 'text_long' but task description specifies 'Text (plain, long)' which maps to 'string_long' per Drupal documentation. A verifier checking type=='text_long' would fail an agent correctly following the task description.
